headline: Steel Dynamics (STLD) Q2 Earnings Preview: What You Should Know Beyond the Headline Estimates
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for Steel Dynamics (STLD), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended June 2026.

headline: After The Shock: Where Resources Go Next
summary: Geopolitical shocks drove extreme commodity swings in Q2, but normalizing conditions are revealing meaningful mispricings across the natural resources complex. Read more here.
